data.title: Linux 7.0 is finally here — packing more AMD and Intel hardware support and a bulging changelog, here's what you need to know

data.title: Anthropic's Claude hits No. 2 on Apple's top free apps list after Pentagon rejection
data.description: OpenAI's ChatGPT remains the top free app in the U.S. on Apple's rankings, but Claude has steadily gained traction.

data.title: Greg Abel as Berkshire Earnings Fall: 'Warren Is Obviously a Very Hard Act To Follow'
data.description: Greg Abel, calling Warren Buffett "a very hard act to follow," signaled continuity at Berkshire as Q4 operating earnings fell about 30% and the cash hoard dipped despite no buybacks.
